# Blanked - Memory Training Game

> Blanked is a free visual memory training game for iOS. Study a scene, it disappears, answer from memory. 6 game modes, 380+ levels, 2-minute sessions. Built by Dominic in Gibraltar.

## About

Blanked is a visual memory game designed to be played daily in short sessions. Players study a scene filled with shapes, colours, objects, numbers, and patterns for a few seconds. The scene disappears and five questions test their recall.

The game has 6 modes (Classic, Speed, Photographic, Pattern, Motion, Mastermind), each training a different aspect of visual memory. There are 380+ levels with a difficulty curve that starts simple and scales to genuinely hard.

Blanked is free to play. All levels are accessible without payment. Blanked+ is an optional subscription for removing ads and cosmetics.

## Founder

Dominic Roworth, based in Gibraltar. Solo indie developer.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dominicroworth/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playblanked
- Email: hello@playblanked.com

## Technical

Built with Next.js, deployed on Vercel, data on Supabase. System fonts, no external font loading. Blog content authored in a custom Lexical WYSIWYG editor, stored as markdown, rendered server-side.
